title: Nerfed Totems
description: Makes Totems of Undying less OP by giving them a cooldown between uses.
body:
# Nerfed Totems:

When you use a Totem of Undying, any Totems of Undying that you either pick up or have in your inventory go on cooldown, and you have to wait 30 seconds before you can use one again.

With this mod, Players will now be less reliant on Totems of Undying, but they can still use them in a pinch.

# Other:

**Mod Packs:**

If you want to use this mod in a Mod Pack, you can, as long as you give me credit.
